name: Softcat PLC
description: A leading UK IT infrastructure and services provider, supplying hardware, software and services to corporate and public sector customers.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: Customer account growth (~15,000 customers), cross-selling additional IT solutions, public sector digitalisation, cloud migration spend, and cybersecurity demand.
assumptions.marginDrivers: Operating leverage from revenue growth on relatively fixed cost base. Gross margin ~20% on gross invoiced income. Asset-light model with high cash conversion (>100%).
assumptions.risks: Macro-driven IT spending delays, vendor concentration (Microsoft, Cisco), competition from CDW/Insight, talent retention in tight labour market.
assumptions.catalyst: Continued customer acquisition, average customer spend growth, public sector framework wins, and potential entry into adjacent markets.
